# UC-17.5.7 · Forcepoint SSL Inspection Bypass by Category and Destination (`websense:cg:kv`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Security, Compliance &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

Every bypass is a potential malware tunnel; monitoring volume ensures exceptions remain rare.

## Value

Risk officers validate that bypass lists align with crypto regulations.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=proxy sourcetype="websense:cg:kv" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)bypass|decrypt.*no|ssl.*inspect")
| stats count by category, dst_host, user
| sort -count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Table (destination, category), timeline.

## Known False Positives

Anomalies from new SaaS app rollouts, browser updates, or vendor URL category changes.
